body: This PR fixes a bug from #4475, where the `microphysics_n_substeps_quadrature` parsed arg was silently dropped.
title: Restore microphysics_n_substeps_quadrature in AtmosWater

body:
- Unified the numerics setup for the 3 precipitating prognostic EDMF cases.
- Deleted the variants of them that are not useful for flagship AMIP configuration (like explicit diffusion, microphysics or edmf).
- Deleted the trmm sparse autodif case (with consent from the person who worked on it). we still have two CI cases for autodiff
- Added the three precipitating cases to regression tests
title: Cleanup in prognostic edmf 1M CI cases
